# /final-review

## Purpose
Validate final review consistency, drift detection, and ADR linkage before opening a PR.

## When To Use
After review-cycle passes on the clean commit/range that will be published.

## Required Contracts
- `final-review-consistency` - final-review evidence status and commit/range linkage are consistent (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_final_review.py`)
- `drift-detection` - Declared issue targets and actual changed paths must not drift (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_drift_detection.py`)
- `review-evidence-link` - Review evidence links to current commit/range (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_review_evidence.py`)
- `adr-index-consistency` - ADR body, JSON index, and decisions index are consistent (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_adr_index.py`)

## Next Commands
- `/create-pr`
- `/waiver`

## Source Of Truth
- `framework/scripts/manifest.yaml`
